content.title: Yuex Website - Builder.io Powered Next.js Application
content.short_description: This is a modern Next. js website project that leverages Builder
content.description: This is a modern Next.js website project that leverages Builder.io for headless content management, enabling dynamic page creation and editing capabilities. The application uses React 18 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS for styling, and includes advanced features like Lottie animations, cookie consent management, and containerized deployment through Docker.
content.role: I contributed to this project by implementing critical build fixes and dependency management. Specifically, I resolved build failures that occurred after Lottie animation integration by updating Docker configurations and package dependencies. I also managed version control operations including reverting problematic changes and ensuring stable deployment configurations.

achievements: Successfully resolved build failures that were blocking deployment after Lottie integration
Maintained project stability through careful dependency management
Ensured proper Docker configuration for seamless containerized deployment
Contributed to maintaining the project's modern tech stack and functionality
technologies: Git version control and build troubleshooting

screenshots: Main website homepage with Builder.io content
